final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original food photography close-up of a Japanese 拉面 bowl (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a professional food photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be close-up with chopsticks lifting noodles as focal action; background must be bokeh/shallow depth-of-field
Subject: must include all toppings and elements:
  - 浓郁豚骨汤底 (rich, milky broth)
  - 叉烧 (chashu pork slices)
  - 溏心蛋 (soft-boiled marinated egg, halved)
  - 海苔 (nori sheet)
  - 葱花 (chopped green onions)
  - 筷子 lifting a portion of noodles
Scene/backdrop: needs a blurred, warm restaurant or tabletop backdrop — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a steamy, appetizing atmosphere with visible rising steam — exact light source and steam treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a rich, warm, appetite-stimulating direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a glossy broth surface, tender meat texture, and glistening noodle sheen — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must show visible steam rising from the bowl; chopsticks must be actively lifting noodles
Avoid: must avoid flat lighting, cluttered props, or any element that reduces appetite appeal
